rationale: The cited paper is used in the theory section to define AI aversion and to justify measuring it as non-use of available AI tools, not just as attitudes. The citing paper explicitly references Castelo et al. (2019) when introducing the AI-aversion construct and even points to its Table 1 to support this operationalization. This role directly informs the citing paper's first-stage conceptual framework and empirical modeling of tutors' utilization decisions, so the citation is more than a passing background mention.
relation_description: The citing paper relies on Castelo et al. (2019) as a conceptual foundation for defining and operationalizing AI aversion in its tutoring context. It builds its utilization-stage framework on that definition while examining AI assistance in a new service setting.
